channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: psql_bm25s
item.description: psql_bm25s PostgreSQL extension implementing BM25-family lexical retrieval as a native index access method.

item.title: Dropbox
item.description: Dropbox About Cloud file storage and collaboration platform.

item.title: Otto
item.description: Otto Otto (otto.de) is one of Germany’s largest e-commerce companies, transitioning from a catalogue retailer to a marketplace with millions of products from multiple sellers.

item.title: Pinecone
item.description: Pinecone Company behind Pinecone Vector DB, a managed vector database for dense and hybrid retrieval.

item.title: BM25
item.description: BM25 Definition BM25 (Best Match 25) is the dominant lexical retrieval algorithm — the scoring function behind Elasticsearch’s default relevance, Solr, Lucene, and most production search engines.

item.title: Click Signals
item.description: Click Signals Definition Click signals are behavioral data collected from user interactions with search results — clicks, dwell time, reformulations, and conversions.

item.title: Feature Store
item.description: Feature Store Definition A feature store is the system that persists and serves the ranking features an LTR model consumes — BM25 components, popularity/CTR counters, item metadata (price, category), user/profile signals — keeping training-time and serving-time feature values consistent.

item.title: Full-Text Search
item.description: Full-Text Search Definition Full-text search (FTS) retrieves documents by matching query terms against the words in a document, typically over an inverted index, and scores matches by term-frequency-based relevance.

item.title: HNSW
item.description: HNSW — Hierarchical Navigable Small World Graph-based approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) index. Malkov & Yashunin, 2018 (arXiv:1603.09320).
